## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-04-18 — do not edit manually*

### Netlify CLI Usage
*~600 tokens/session saved*
- Run `netlify link --id <SITE_ID>` before any `netlify env:get` calls; without a linked site the CLI silently returns empty output.
- The Netlify site ID for `react_albihubs` is `2de2cfda-f816-4099-8606-10939daf659b`.
- Complex inline env-var injection via `$(netlify env:get ...)` subshells is blocked by permission policy; retrieve each value separately and export before using.

### Project Structure
*~400 tokens/session saved*
- This monorepo lives at `/Users/TinierTim/TBDev/techrp`; sibling projects include `../gps_sms_generators`, `../gps_fupm`, `../react_ppcanalyzer`, `../react_albihubs`, `../EdwinKPI`, `../attached_reports`.
- There is no `.env` file in `react_albihubs`; use `.env.example` to understand required variables. Netlify env vars must be retrieved via `netlify env:get <KEY> --context production --scope functions` (after `netlify link`).

### File Paths — gps_sms_generators
*~350 tokens/session saved*
- `../gps_sms_generators/middleware.ts` does NOT exist at the project root; locate it first with `find ../gps_sms_generators -maxdepth 2 -name 'middleware.ts'`.
- `../gps_sms_generators/app/'(auth)'/layout.tsx` does NOT exist; only `app/'(app)'/layout.tsx` is present.
- `../gps_sms_generators/next.config.js` does NOT exist; the config is `next.config.ts`.

### Google Apps Script Projects
*~200 tokens/session saved*
- GAS projects (`EdwinKPI`, `attached_reports`) are deployed with `clasp push`; validate syntax first with `node --check <file.js>`.
- Files in these projects often have spaces in names (e.g., `'update Albi Data.js'`, `'fix Albi Dates.js'`, `'update Attached.js'`) — always quote them.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
